");background-repeat:no-repeat;background-size:500% 100%;background-position:var(--window-pos,0%) center;filter:sepia(.2) brightness(.72);transition:filter .8s}.study-window .window-light:after{content:"";position:absolute;inset:26% 29% 18%;border-radius:35% 35% 8% 8%;background:radial-gradient(ellipse,rgba(247,196,101,.74),rgba(226,143,59,.22) 46%,transparent 74%);opacity:0;mix-blend-mode:screen;filter:blur(8px);transition:opacity .9s}.study-window.unlocked .window-light{filter:sepia(.08) brightness(1.08)}.study-window.unlocked .window-light:after{opacity:.78;animation:windowLamp 3.8s ease-in-out infinite}@keyframes windowLamp{50%{opacity:.48;transform:scale(.94)}}.study-window.w1{--window-pos:0%;--window-index:0}.study-window.w2{--window-pos:25%;--window-index:1}.study-window.w3{--window-pos:50%;--window-index:2}.study-window.w4{--window-pos:75%;--window-index:3}.study-window.w5{--window-pos:100%;--window-index:4}
    .palazzo-reveal{position:relative;z-index:2;display:grid;grid-template-columns:94px 1fr;align-items:center;gap:18px;max-height:0;margin-top:0;padding:0 25px;overflow:hidden;opacity:0;border-top:1px solid rgba(214,180,112,.14);transition:max-height .9s var(--ease),opacity .7s,margin .7s,padding .7s}.palazzo-reveal.open{max-height:135px;margin-top:16px;padding:16px 25px;opacity:1}.palazzo-reveal>i{height:74px;background:url("data:image/webp;base64,
